entity.label: Shimeah
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: A Benjamite, a descendant of Gibeon (1 Chr. 8:32); called also Shimeam (9:38).

nodes.label: Shimeah
nodes.description: A Benjamite, a descendant of Gibeon (1 Chr. 8:32); called also Shimeam (9:38).

verses.text: And Mikloth begat Shimeah. And these also dwelt with their brethren in Jerusalem, over against them.
